title: Security and Data Leak Review for Shamrock Rovers FC
description: Comprehensive security audit reviewing credential exposure, GDPR compliance, FC branding/IP concerns, and third-party service integration security

title: Credential and Secret Exposure Audit
description: Review environment files, docker-compose, credential scripts, and docs/CREDENTIALS-CHECKLIST.md. Identify hardcoded credentials, exposed API keys, weak webhook secrets. Verify AWS Secrets Manager usage.

title: GDPR and Privacy Compliance Review
description: Review database schema, API handlers, auth middleware, and repositories. Check PII handling (emails, phone, names, transaction history), consent management, data retention, right-to-be-forgotten features.

title: FC Branding, IP, and Data Ownership Assessment
description: Review README, docs, and frontend for Shamrock Rovers FC branding, URLs, and business logic exposure. Assess data ownership clauses, IP protection, FC data extractability.

title: Infrastructure and Deployment Security Audit
description: Review AWS CDK stack for RDS security, S3 policies, Lambda IAM roles, API Gateway auth, and secrets management. Check CORS, rate limiting, logging.

title: Frontend Security and Data Exposure Review
description: Audit React app for API keys in client code, console data leaks, localStorage usage, XSS vulnerabilities, and supporter data exposure. Review auth token handling.

title: Documentation and .gitignore Security Review
description: Review .gitignore and all documentation for exposed credentials, test accounts (gleesonb@gmail.com), internal URLs, deployment details, and confidential FC information.

title: Architecture Review, Security Remediation, and Deployment Planning
description: Comprehensive security audit remediation, GDPR compliance implementation, architecture improvements, cost optimization, and fresh deployment planning for Supporter-360 application. Stack is currently deleted and needs complete redeployment with all security fixes.

title: Add Security Monitoring and Alerting
description: Create CloudWatch dashboards for security metrics. Implement SNS alerts. Add structured logging for security events.

title: Infrastructure Security and Cost Optimization
description: Review infrastructure costs. Update CDK stack with security fixes. Create AWS Budgets alert. Document cost optimization strategies.

title: Create Deployment Plan and Validation Scripts
description: Document deployment procedure. Create validation scripts. Add health check endpoints. Create rollback procedures.

title: Serverless architecture migration for Supporter360
description: Migrate from current architecture (NAT Gateway + RDS t4g.medium + CloudFront) to optimized serverless architecture (VPC endpoints + RDS Serverless v2 + S3 direct). Target: reduce monthly costs from $80-130 to $30-50 by eliminating unnecessary components while maintaining all functionality.

title: Create VPC endpoint strategy documentation
description: Research and document which AWS services need VPC endpoints vs internet access. Identify all external API calls (Stripe, Shopify, GoCardless, Mailchimp, Future Ticketing) and categorize Lambda functions by their network requirements. Create migration plan document at docs/serverless-migration-plan.md

title: Update CDK stack: RDS Serverless v2 + VPC endpoints + remove NAT Gateway + CloudFront
description: Comprehensive update to supporter360-stack.ts: 1) Replace RDS t4g.medium with ServerlessV2Cluster (min ACU_0_5, max ACU_2), 2) Add VPC interface endpoints for Secrets Manager, SQS, and S3 Gateway endpoint, 3) Remove NAT Gateway from VPC configuration, 4) Remove CloudFront distribution and replace with S3 static website hosting, 5) Update S3 lifecycle rules (30 days to Glacier Deep Archive, 90 days expiration), 6) Move all Lambda functions to use new architecture (webhooks to public subnets, API handlers and processors to use VPC endpoints), 7) Add CloudWatch alarms for Serverless v2 metrics.

title: Update database connection layer for Serverless v2
description: Update packages/backend/src/db/connection.ts to optimize connection pooling for RDS Serverless v2. Reduce max pool size from 5 to 2, add connection retry logic for cold starts, and implement connection warming for Serverless v2 scaling.

title: Update cost optimization documentation
description: Update docs/cost-optimization.md with new architecture costs. Document expected monthly costs: RDS Serverless v2 ($0.50-2), S3 hosting ($1-2), Lambda/SQS/API Gateway ($20-30), no NAT Gateway ($0), no CloudFront ($0). Total expected: $25-40/month.

title: Create migration testing plan
description: Create detailed testing plan at docs/migration-testing-plan.md documenting how to test each component change: database migration to Serverless v2, VPC endpoint connectivity, webhook ingestion, API access, frontend serving, and end-to-end integration tests.

title: Create rollback procedures documentation
description: Document rollback procedures for each major change at docs/migration-rollback.md. Include steps to revert from Serverless v2 to t4g.medium, restore NAT Gateway, restore CloudFront, and emergency contact procedures.

title: Update deployment scripts for new architecture
description: Update scripts/validate-deployment.sh and health-check.sh to handle new architecture. Check for VPC endpoints, Serverless v2 status, and absence of NAT Gateway/CloudFront.

title: Audit and fix Future Ticketing data quality issues
description: Review Future Ticketing integration code (client.ts, types.ts, processor.ts, poller.handler.ts) for data quality issues. Identify problems with API call responses, data parsing, validation, and deduplication. Fix any bugs causing poor data quality. Add validation and error handling for malformed FT responses.

title: Update NOTES.md with migration status
description: Update NOTES.md to document the architecture migration as current work. Add before/after comparison, cost savings achieved, FT data quality fixes, and any issues encountered during migration.

title: Review migration plans and deploy serverless architecture
description: Review the migration, testing, and rollback plans created in the previous swarm. If all reviews are green (no blockers), proceed with CDK deployment to implement the serverless architecture changes.

title: Review migration plan for completeness and accuracy
description: Read docs/serverless-migration-plan.md and review for: (1) VPC endpoint strategy correctness, (2) Lambda categorization accuracy, (3) Cost calculations accuracy, (4) Migration step ordering, (5) Missing components or risks. Report: GREEN (deploy), YELLOW (concerns but proceed), or RED (blocker found).

title: Review testing plan for coverage and feasibility
description: Read docs/migration-testing-plan.md and review for: (1) Test coverage completeness, (2) Test order correctness, (3) Time estimates realistic, (4) Success criteria clear, (5) Missing critical tests. Report: GREEN (deploy), YELLOW (concerns but proceed), or RED (blocker found).

title: Review rollback plan for safety and completeness
description: Read docs/migration-rollback.md and review for: (1) Rollback procedures complete, (2) Time estimates realistic, (3) Prerequisites documented, (4) Emergency contacts section, (5) Decision tree clarity. Report: GREEN (safe to proceed), YELLOW (add safeguards), or RED (unsafe).

title: Deployment readiness check and CDK deployment
description: Wait for all 3 reviews. If any RED status, report blockers and STOP. If all GREEN/YELLOW, proceed with deployment: (1) Check current git status, (2) Verify packages/infrastructure synth works, (3) Run cdk deploy, (4) Monitor deployment, (5) Run health checks, (6) Report deployment status.

title: Fix critical deployment blockers
description: Fix two critical blockers preventing deployment: (1) Internet access for mailchimp-syncer and gocardless-processor using most cost-effective approach with secure signing, (2) Migrate from Aurora Serverless v1 to RDS Serverless v2 for correct pricing and scaling.

title: Third-Party Integration Security Review
description: Audit webhook verification, integration clients (Stripe, Shopify, GoCardless, Mailchimp, Future Ticketing), webhook handlers, and processors. Check signature verification, replay attack prevention, timing-safe comparisons.

title: Fix Critical Webhook Security Vulnerabilities
description: Implement proper webhook signature verification for all integrations. Fix Mailchimp webhook verification which currently only checks structure without signature validation.

title: Enable SSL Certificate Verification and Harden Database Connections
description: Remove rejectUnauthorized: false from database connection pool. Configure proper SSL/TLS for RDS connections with certificate validation.

title: Implement API Rate Limiting and Throttling
description: Add rate limiting to API Gateway using CDK. Implement Lambda-based rate limiting. Add rate limit headers to API responses.

title: Restrict CORS and Enhance Authentication
description: Replace ALL_ORIGINS with specific allowed origins in CDK. Add API Gateway Lambda authorizer. Update auth middleware.

title: Implement GDPR Compliance Features
description: Add consent tracking, GDPR API endpoints (data portability, right-to-be-forgotten, consent management), data retention policies, scheduled anonymization job.

title: Research cost-effective internet access options
description: Research most cost-effective internet access options for Lambda functions needing external API access. Compare: public subnets (free), NAT Gateway ($16/mo), NAT Instance (~$30/mo), VPC endpoints (don't work for external APIs), API Gateway proxy pattern. Recommend secure approach with API keys/signing.

title: Fix CDK stack: RDS Serverless v2 + public subnets for external API callers
description: Update packages/infrastructure/lib/supporter360-stack.ts: (1) Replace Aurora Serverless v1 with RDS Serverless v2 using rds.DatabaseInstance engine with ServerlessV2 scaling, (2) Move mailchimp-syncer and gocardless-processor to PUBLIC_SUBNETS with allowPublicSubnetInbound=true for direct internet access, (3) Keep VPC endpoints for internal services, (4) Ensure all Lambda functions can access database.

title: Update migration plan with Serverless v2 architecture
description: Update docs/serverless-migration-plan.md to reflect actual architecture: RDS Serverless v2 (not Aurora v1), public subnets for external API callers, accurate cost projections, and correct Lambda categorization.

title: Fix rollback plan technical errors
description: Fix docs/migration-rollback.md technical errors: (1) Correct RDS rollback for ServerlessV2 (not ServerlessCluster), (2) Fix NAT Gateway CDK syntax (natGateways: 1 in VPC config), (3) Correct database secret references (postgres, not supporter360-postgres), (4) Update time estimates.

title: Synth and validate CDK stack
description: Validate the fixed CDK stack: run cdk synth to verify CloudFormation template, check for errors, ensure RDS Serverless v2 configuration is valid, verify public subnet Lambda functions can access internet and database.

title: Deploy Verification: Migrations, Webhooks, and Integration Tests
Test all webhook endpoints with sample payloads
description: Test POST requests to all 4 webhook endpoints (/webhooks/shopify, /webhooks/stripe, /webhooks/gocardless, /webhooks/mailchimp) with valid sample payloads. Verify: (1) endpoint responds correctly, (2) messages are queued to SQS, (3) S3 raw payloads are archived. Output: test results for each webhook with HTTP status codes and queue confirmations.

title: Run database migrations and verify schema
description: Invoke the database migration Lambda function (Supporter360StackV2-DbMigrationA9ABF2D2-2X0HPQ4xPcjO), wait for completion, verify schema is applied correctly to Aurora Serverless v2 database. Output: migration logs, schema verification results, any errors encountered.

title: Verify Lambda function integrations and connectivity
description: Verify all critical Lambda functions can access required services: (1) Processors can access database via VPC endpoints, (2) Public subnets allow internet access for GoCardless processor and Mailchimp syncer, (3) Secrets Manager access works for all functions. Output: connectivity test results with any access issues.

title: Generate deployment verification report
description: Create comprehensive report including: (1) migration status, (2) webhook test results, (3) integration verification status, (4) list of manual checks required (e.g., configure actual API keys, set up webhook URLs with external providers), (5) next steps for production readiness. Output: structured markdown report with sections for automation results and manual asks.

title: Complete Supporter 360 Production Readiness - Post-Deployment Configuration
description: Complete 20 manual configuration tasks identified in deployment verification report to achieve full production readiness. Current status: 35/100. Goal: 100/100 through database migrations, webhook configuration, security hardening, monitoring setup, and documentation completion.

title: Database migration and verification
description:
Invoke the DbMigration Lambda function to apply schema.sql to the RDS Serverless v2 database, then verify all 17 tables are created correctly.

Steps:
1. Get DbMigration Lambda function name from CloudFormation
2. Invoke the function: aws lambda invoke --function-name Supporter360StackV2-DbMigration* --payload '{}' response.json
3. Check response.json for success (statusCode 200)
4. Connect to database and verify tables exist: \dt should show 17 tables
5. Run verification queries from deployment-verification.md section 2
6. Document any migration failures and resolve

Deliverable: Verification report showing all 17 tables created

title: Infrastructure security hardening (CORS, Lambda authorizer, WAF)
description:
Update infrastructure with security enhancements: CORS configuration, Lambda authorizer deployment, and WAF setup.

Part 1 - CORS Configuration:
1. Create packages/backend/src/config/cors.ts with ALLOWED_ORIGINS array
2. Include production S3 static website URL
3. Remove localhost origins from production list
4. Update supporter360-stack.ts to import and use ALLOWED_ORIGINS
5. Change allowOrigins from ALL_ORIGINS to ALLOWED_ORIGINS

Part 2 - Lambda Authorizer:
1. Add Lambda authorizer construct to supporter360-stack.ts
2. Attach authorizer to protected endpoints (/api/*, /supporters/*, /admin/*)
3. Redeploy infrastructure
4. Test with valid and invalid API keys

Part 3 - WAF Configuration:
1. Add WAF web ACL construct to supporter360-stack.ts
2. Add managed rule groups (AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet)
3. Add rate-based rule (1000 requests per 5 minutes per IP)
4. Associate WAF with API Gateway
5. Redeploy and test

Deliverable: Infrastructure deployed with CORS, authorizer, and WAF

title: Monitoring setup (CloudWatch dashboard, alarms, SNS topics)
description:
Create and deploy comprehensive monitoring infrastructure.

Part 1 - CloudWatch Dashboard:
1. Create scripts/cloudwatch-dashboard.json with widgets for Lambda, API Gateway, RDS, SQS metrics
2. Create scripts/deploy-dashboard.sh
3. Deploy dashboard and verify

Part 2 - CloudWatch Alarms:
1. Create scripts/deploy-alarms.sh with 5 critical alarms:
   - Lambda error rate > 5%
   - API Gateway 5XX errors
   - RDS CPU > 80%
   - All 4 DLQs have messages
   - All 4 main queues age > 1 hour
2. Create SNS topic for alerts
3. Subscribe team email
4. Deploy alarms and test

Part 3 - Performance Insights:
1. Create scripts/enable-performance-insights.sh
2. Enable Performance Insights on RDS
3. Set retention to 7 days
4. Verify dashboard accessible

Deliverable: Complete monitoring infrastructure deployed

title: Webhook configuration (secrets, URL registration, testing)
description:
Manual configuration of all 4 webhooks with external providers.

Part 1 - Update Webhook Secrets:
1. Gather webhook secrets from providers (Shopify, Stripe, GoCardless, Mailchimp)
2. Update Secrets Manager for each integration
3. Verify updates

Part 2 - Register Webhook URLs:
1. Get API Gateway URL from deployed stack
2. Register webhook URLs with each provider
3. Select appropriate webhook events

Part 3 - Test Webhooks:
1. Create test payloads for each integration
2. Generate correct signatures
3. Send test requests
4. Verify SQS queues receive messages
5. Verify processors handle messages
6. Verify S3 archiving works

Part 4 - Fix Shopify Scopes:
1. Add read_orders scope to Shopify app
2. Reinstall app
3. Test order webhooks

Deliverable: All 4 webhooks configured and tested

title: API Gateway usage plan and rate limiting
description:
Create API Gateway usage plan with rate limits and generate production API keys.

Steps:
1. Create scripts/deploy-usage-plan.sh
2. Create usage plan with throttle (100 burst, 300 rate)
3. Create quota (10000 requests/month per key)
4. Generate secure API keys (openssl rand -hex 32)
5. Store API keys in database
6. Deploy and test rate limits

Deliverable: API Gateway usage plan deployed with production API keys

title: Security and compliance setup (CloudTrail, VPC flow logs, backups)
description:
Configure security logging, audit trails, and backup retention.

Part 1 - CloudTrail:
1. Create scripts/deploy-cloudtrail.sh
2. Create S3 bucket for logs with encryption
3. Create CloudTrail
4. Enable log file validation
5. Set lifecycle policy

Part 2 - VPC Flow Logs:
1. Create scripts/deploy-flow-logs.sh
2. Create CloudWatch log group
3. Enable VPC flow logs
4. Set retention to 7 days

Part 3 - Backup Configuration:
1. Create scripts/configure-backups.sh
2. Update RDS retention to 30 days
3. Create S3 bucket for backups
4. Create AWS Backup plan
5. Test restore procedure

Part 4 - Cost Monitoring:
1. Create scripts/deploy-budgets.sh
2. Create monthly budget ($50/month)
3. Set up spend alerts (80%, 100%)
4. Subscribe finance team

Deliverable: Security and compliance infrastructure deployed

title: Documentation and runbooks creation
description:
Create comprehensive operational documentation.

Part 1 - Runbooks:
1. Create docs/runbooks/incident-response.md
2. Create docs/runbooks/rollback-procedures.md
3. Create docs/runbooks/backup-restore.md
4. Create docs/runbooks/performance-tuning.md
5. Create docs/runbooks/index.md

Part 2 - Security Documentation:
1. Create docs/security-monitoring.md
2. Update docs/security-checklist.md
3. Document monitoring procedures
4. Document log analysis

Part 3 - Deployment Documentation:
1. Update docs/deployment.md with post-deployment procedures
2. Add sections 7-10 (configuration, monitoring, troubleshooting, rollback)
3. Include links to all runbooks
4. Update table of contents

Part 4 - Verification Scripts:
1. Create scripts/post-deployment-checklist.sh
2. Create scripts/generate-readiness-report.sh
3. Create docs/handoff.md

Deliverable: Complete documentation library
